name: handmux
desc: A mobile vibe-coding cockpit — built on tmux: drive your live session, Claude Code / Codex — anything a terminal can run — from your phone. 移动 Vibe Coding 驾驶舱 …
descFull: A mobile vibe-coding cockpit — built on tmux: drive your live session, Claude Code / Codex — anything a terminal can run — from your phone. 移动 Vibe Coding 驾驶舱 —— 基于 tmux 实现，可在手机上驱动你的会话、Claude Code / Codex、任何终端能实现的东西。
